evaluators.name: 5 kW Quote Under $120 Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user configured a 5 kW residential quote for ZIP 94110 with the correct inputs and saved at least one plan from that request whose estimated monthly payment is at or below $120.

evaluators.name: 6–8 kW Package Cheapest Qualifying Added Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added to their quote list the correct residential package between 6–8 kW: within the first two cheapest results, under $15,000, with panel warranty ≥ 20 years, and that they chose the cheapest qualifying one.

evaluators.name: Earliest Weekday 10AM Virtual Consultation Booked Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a virtual residential consultation for ZIP 78704 at a 10:00 AM slot and that the slot corresponds to the earliest available weekday 10:00 AM virtual slot.

evaluators.name: Most Recent Federal Tax Credit Article Saved with Tag Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the most recent relevant federal solar tax credit article to their reading list and tagged it with 'Incentives 2024'.

evaluators.name: Savings Scenario $1500+ for ZIP 85001 Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a savings scenario for ZIP 85001 with the specified inputs and at least $1,500 estimated annual savings under the name 'Target $1500+ savings'.

evaluators.name: Top-Rated Qualifying Installer Contacted Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user contacted an installer within 25 miles of ZIP 30301 with rating ≥ 4.5 and ≥ 50 reviews, and that the contacted installer is the highest-rated among those qualifiers.

evaluators.name: 16×400W + ≥10 kWh Battery Design Summary Viewed Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a residential asphalt-shingle design with 16×400W panels, at least 10 kWh of battery storage, string inverter, and viewed its system summary (tracked via task7_summaryViewed).

evaluators.name: Lowest-APR Qualifying Financing Pre-Application Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a draft financing pre-application for an $18,000 project in ZIP 60601 with credit range 680–719, and that the chosen option is the lowest-APR offer among those with upfront payment ≤ $3,000 and estimated monthly payments ≤ $150.
